headline: Fortinet (FTNT) Expands FortiEndpoint To Tackle AI Security And Governance
summary: Fortinet (NasdaqGS:FTNT) has expanded its FortiEndpoint platform with new AI visibility, data protection, and AI-assisted operations features. The update introduces tools to monitor AI usage, apply governance policies, and protect data within AI interactions across enterprise endpoints. Fortinet is also adding natural language driven capabilities to support security operations teams in threat hunting and endpoint protection workflows. Fortinet is known for its broad cybersecurity portfolio,...

headline: Fortinet (FTNT) Stock Could Be 39% Above Fair Value Despite AI Security Growth
summary: Fortinet stock has delivered a strong 216.2% return over the past 5 years, yet both its Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate and market multiples currently point to the shares trading at a premium. With recent sector enthusiasm around AI-driven security and SASE on one side, and valuation concerns on the other, investors are weighing how much optimism is already in the price. A 216.2% gain over 5 years shows Fortinet has been a rewarding stock for long term holders, which can...
